title: Small Business Flexibility Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
crs_summary: Small Business Flexibility Act This bill provides statutory authority for the pooling of tips among two pools of employees. The first pool consists of employees who customarily and regularly receive tips (as is permitted under the current statute). The second pool consists of (1) employees who customarily and regularly receive tips and are paid at least minimum wage, and (2) employees who do not customarily and regularly receive tips.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
